text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho declares her intention to cast her
magic on the whole world at the Takarazuka
Kinen. Hearing this, Zenno Rob Roy makes a
decision of her own.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hopes to win the Senior Autumn Triple
Crown, become Umamusume of the Year, and
then—as the representative of the Triple Crown
tour—slay the witch at the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the last thing Sweep Tosho needs to
complete her racing magic—a special rival—has
presented itself.
